name: Botpress
description: Agentic AI platform for building and deploying autonomous agents with reasoning loops that can pause when blocked and resume when data becomes available. Supports multi-channel deployment, tool/API calling, persistent memory, and flexible LLM selection.
pricing: Usage-based with starter and enterprise tiers
notes: Secured $25M Series B funding for platform acceleration. Focuses on infrastructure for running agents safely at scale. Supports use cases: customer support, task automation, sales enablement, IT support.
